landing.heroTitle: Transform Speech to Text in Seconds
landing.heroSubtitle: Powerful AI-driven transcription that converts your voice recordings into accurate text with intelligent summarization.
landing.heroNote: No signup required. Free to use.
landing.demoText: Your speech appears here in real-time...
landing.featuresSubtitle: Everything you need to transcribe and understand your audio content
landing.feature1Desc: Watch your words appear as you speak with our advanced real-time speech recognition.
landing.feature2Desc: Upload audio and video files in any format for accurate transcription.
landing.feature3Desc: Support for 30+ languages with automatic language detection.
landing.feature4Desc: Get intelligent summaries of your transcriptions powered by advanced AI.
landing.feature5Desc: Share transcriptions with others or export in multiple formats.
landing.feature6Desc: Your audio is processed securely and never stored without permission.
landing.howItWorksSubtitle: Get started in minutes with our simple process
landing.step1Desc: Record directly in your browser or upload an existing audio file.
landing.step2Desc: Our AI transcribes your audio with high accuracy in seconds.
landing.step3Desc: Review the transcription and make any necessary edits.
landing.step4Desc: Download in your preferred format or share directly.
landing.useCasesSubtitle: See how professionals use our transcription service
landing.useCase1Desc: Capture every detail from important conversations without taking notes.
landing.useCase2Desc: Transcribe lectures and interviews for easy review and citation.
landing.useCase3Desc: Generate subtitles and captions for videos automatically.
landing.useCase4Desc: Convert interviews and field recordings into written content.
landing.faqSubtitle: Find answers to common questions about our service
landing.finalCtaSubtitle: Join thousands of users who trust us for accurate transcription.

faq.a1: Yes! Our basic transcription service is completely free with no signup required. Premium features are available for power users.
faq.a2: We support all major audio and video formats including MP3, WAV, M4A, MP4, WebM, and more.
faq.a3: Our AI achieves 95%+ accuracy for clear audio in supported languages. Accuracy may vary based on audio quality.
faq.a4: Absolutely. We process audio securely and don't store your files unless you explicitly save them to your account.
faq.a5: We support 30+ languages including English, Spanish, Portuguese, French, German, Chinese, Japanese, and many more.
faq.a6: Yes! You can edit the transcription directly in the interface and export the corrected version.

aboutPage.title: About speech-to-text.me
aboutPage.metaDescription: Learn about our mission to make voice transcription accessible to everyone.
aboutPage.missionContent: We believe that converting speech to text should be simple, accurate, and accessible to everyone. Our mission is to break down barriers in communication by providing powerful transcription tools that anyone can use.
aboutPage.whatWeDoContent: speech-to-text.me is a free, web-based voice transcription service powered by advanced AI technology. We help you:
aboutPage.feature1: Transcribe audio and video files with high accuracy
aboutPage.feature2: Record and transcribe in real-time directly in your browser
aboutPage.feature3: Generate intelligent summaries of your content
aboutPage.feature4: Support over 30 languages with automatic detection
aboutPage.technologyContent: We leverage cutting-edge speech recognition and natural language processing technology to deliver fast, accurate transcriptions. Our AI models are continuously trained to improve accuracy across different accents, languages, and audio conditions.
aboutPage.privacyContent: Your privacy is paramount. We process all audio securely and never store your files without your explicit permission. Read our Privacy Policy for complete details on how we protect your data.
aboutPage.contactContent: Have questions or feedback? We'd love to hear from you.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.metaDescription: Get in touch with the speech-to-text.me team.
contact.intro: Have questions, feedback, or need support? We're here to help. Fill out the form below and we'll get back to you as soon as possible.
contact.messagePlaceholder: Tell us more about your inquiry...
contact.successMessage: Thank you for reaching out. We'll get back to you within 24-48 hours.
contact.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again or email us directly.

pricing.title: Simple, Transparent Pricing
pricing.metaDescription: Choose the plan that fits your transcription needs.
pricing.subtitle: Start for free, upgrade when you need more

faq.title: Pricing FAQ
faq.a1: Yes, you can upgrade or downgrade your plan at any time. Changes take effect immediately.
faq.q2: What payment methods do you accept?
faq.a2: We accept all major credit cards, PayPal, and bank transfers for enterprise plans.
faq.q3: Is there a free trial for Pro?
faq.a3: Yes! Pro plans come with a 14-day free trial. No credit card required.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.metaDescription: Learn how we collect, use, and protect your data.
privacy.section1Content: At speech-to-text.me, we take your privacy seriously. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard your information when you use our voice transcription service.
privacy.section2Content: We collect information that you provide directly to us:
privacy.section2Item1: Account information (email, name) when you create an account
privacy.section2Item2: Audio files you upload for transcription
privacy.section2Item3: Usage data and analytics to improve our service
privacy.section3Content: We use the information we collect to:
privacy.section3Item1: Provide and maintain our transcription service
privacy.section3Item2: Process your audio files and deliver transcriptions
privacy.section3Item3: Send you important updates about our service
privacy.section4Content: We implement appropriate security measures to protect your personal information. All audio processing is done securely, and we use encryption for data transmission and storage.
privacy.section5Content: Audio files uploaded without an account are processed and immediately deleted. If you have an account, your transcriptions are stored until you choose to delete them.
privacy.section6Content: You have the right to access, update, or delete your personal information at any time. Contact us to exercise these rights.
privacy.section7Content: If you have questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at admin@speech-to-text.me.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.metaDescription: Read our terms of service for using speech-to-text.me.
terms.section1Content: By accessing or using speech-to-text.me, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree to these terms, please do not use our service.
terms.section2Content: You agree to use our service only for lawful purposes. You must not:
terms.section2Item1: Upload content that violates any laws or regulations
terms.section2Item2: Attempt to gain unauthorized access to our systems
terms.section2Item3: Use the service to harm, threaten, or harass others
terms.section2Item4: Interfere with or disrupt the service or servers
terms.section3Content: You retain ownership of all audio content you upload. By using our service, you grant us a limited license to process your content for the purpose of providing transcription services.
terms.section4Content: Our service is provided "as is" without warranties of any kind. We do not guarantee the accuracy of transcriptions or uninterrupted access to the service.
terms.section5Content: We shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, or consequential damages arising from your use of our service.
terms.section6Content: We may modify these terms at any time. Continued use of the service after changes constitutes acceptance of the new terms.
terms.section7Content: For questions about these Terms of Service, contact us at admin@speech-to-text.me.
